THEHEROEXPANSION-INFECTED.title: Infected
THEHEROEXPANSION-GOLDEN_RATIO.title: Golden Ratio
THEHEROEXPANSION-GOLDEN_RATIO.descriptio: Whenever you end the turn with unspent {Energy:energyIcons()}, Play this card from anywhere in your deck
THEHEROEXPANSION-DOOMSDAY.title: Doomsday
THEHEROEXPANSION-DOOMSDAY.description: Deal [blue]75%[/blue] more damage, but lose [blue]2[/blue] Max HP.
THEHEROEXPANSION-DREAMY.title: Dreamy
THEHEROEXPANSION-DREAMY.description: Whenever this card is played, add a copy to your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
THEHEROEXPANSION-ADVANTAGEOUS.title: Advantageous
THEHEROEXPANSION-ADVANTAGEOUS.descriptio: The first time you play this card this combat, gain {Amount:energyIcons()}.
THEHEROEXPANSION-ROYAL.title: Royal
THEHEROEXPANSION-ROYAL.description: When this card is played, gain {Stars:starIcons()}.
THEHEROEXPANSION-JUMPSCARE.title: Jumpscare
THEHEROEXPANSION-JUMPSCARE.description: When this card is played, kill all enemies with at least as much [gold]Doom[/gold] as HP.
THEHEROEXPANSION-RAVENOUS.title: Ravenous
THEHEROEXPANSION-RAVENOUS.description: When this card is played, [gold]Evoke[/gold] your leftmost Orb.
